community.name: Local Police Department
community.description:
Welcome the LPD, one of VRChats oldest and largest roleplaying groups bringing entertainment to public lobbies since 2018. The LPD hosts daily VRChat events where officers are assigned to a squad to create roleplay scenarios in public lobbies, themed around interactions with the public and emergency services. Due to the nature of improv, anything can happen during these events. From drug busts and shootouts, to checking mirror dwelling licenses. 

To join the LPD check out the recruitment channel on our Discord at <color=#7289daff>discord.gg/lpd</color>. There you will find the application form as well as our handbook which is packed with all kinds of important information. Once accepted you will go through cadet training, before jumping into patrolling VRChat as an official LPD officer. When you have some experience under your belt you can take additional training to move up the ranks or specialize into other kinds of roleplay that we offer.

Patrol officers will arrest people and bring them to the LPD station to take their mugshot that then gets posted on our discord server for everyone to see. If they choose to not come quietly we have our swat team, known as SLRT, to help persuade them. Once the suspect has been processed they will be handed over to our Corrections Officers and given a nice new home in the LPD Prison with all the other prisoners. And if anyone gets hurt in the process they can be treated by the LMT at our Hospital. To find out how you can help keep the streets of VRChat safe, join our Discord or follow us on Twitter @LPD_vr.

community.name: Nova Corp
community.description:
Nova Corp is a corporate-themed roleplay group that also tries to expand to other games․ Nova Corp differentiates itself from other roleplay communities by the way we create and roleplay‚ as well as our structure․ Designed from the ground up for immersion‚ paying attention to every detail‚ while also remaining accessible for newcomers to the roleplay scene as well as for hardcore veterans looking to expand their experience․ Everything done in Group Instances is in-character․ Our structure also separates leadership positions from staff positions‚ allowing you to take up a leading role without having the responsibility and activity requirements of being a staff member at the same time․

We will have several playable divisions․ Currently it only includes PMC （Private Military Contractors）‚ but will expand to Police and Logistics in the future․ The PMC Division is similar to military roleplay‚ focusing on recon and tactical engagements․ The Police Sub-Division will focus on apprehension rather than combat and will interact more with the VRChat public․ Logistics will focus on transport which keeps our dynamic economy going‚ delivering material in a wide range of vehicles‚ ranging from vans‚ and trucks‚ to trains‚ ocean-going cargo ships‚ and commercial airliners‚ incorporating all forms of transportation․

Nova Corp currently has the most modern ＆ advanced AI combat system in VRChat‚ utilizing P-Shooters and MacoAI․

community.name: SlimeVR
community.description:
SlimeVR is a set of open hardware sensors and open source software that facilitates full-body tracking (FBT) in virtual reality. With no base station required, SlimeVR makes wireless VR FBT affordable and comfortable.
You can learn more over at: https://slimevr.dev

After the immense success of our first hardware release we are now releasing: Butterfly Trackers!
Like the original version, these new SlimeVR Butterfly Trackers are open hardware sensors with open-source software that track the movement of your body. They do not require base stations, can’t be occluded, are completely wireless, and last for days on a single charge. Now, with the brand-new, unique, ultra-light split design inspired by butterflies, they are less than 7 mm thick and weigh less than 10 grams, making them the most comfortable solution for full-body tracking on the market today!

Aside from the trackers themselves we also host a very active community across both VRChat and Discord!
You can find us hosting multiple events each week, ranging from our fixed events such as: Calibrate + Chat and  Tech Support + Chat where you can get help with your trackers!
To events such as: Yoga, Chill and chat, Graffiti, dance, games and more!

You can also find us over on Discord filled with various channels aimed at support, media sharing, hobbies and more!
Join us and over 77.000 other members over at: https://slimevr.dev/discord

community.name: Production House
community.description:
Production House is a public facing... Production House. With a very literal name and purpose. That strives to bring ideas into virtual reality through collaboration, community, and connection. With the goal of becoming the premium spot for all Creatives and Talent looking to find help for their projects or to get involved with others and their projects. Especially those interested in the Video Arts.

Production House is fully public. Meaning anyone is allowed to join. Anyone can create a Production House work. Anyone can influence the Identity of Production House. Anyone of any skill can find a place here. Even if you simply want help but don't want to make your project into a Production House work that is fully acceptable!

- Production House strives to host events, have the leadership involved in projects, and usher in a golden age for the VRChat Video Arts Scene.
- Production House is a No Obligations group. We make no demands of you. Partake at your own pace. You will still be welcome.
- Production House is a place built out of necessity and passion. We have felt the difficulties in finding help, the lack of willingness to collaborate, and have seen the untapped artistic potential within VRChat. We understand the lonely struggle it can sometimes, we aim to change that.
- A serious aspect of Production House is the involvement of the average person. From helping teach those who want to learn, to helping those who have yet to make a name for themselves. We do not do this only for ourselves. We truly wish to make a place for everyone who shares our struggles and passion. We wish to change the VRChat Video Arts scene into something everyone can do and wants to see.

Players step directly into this war as members of the rebellion, becoming the main force driving the story forward. community.name: Specter Security Services

Specter Security Services (SSS) is a heavy-roleplay, narrative-driven group set in a gritty, high-stakes dystopian future (circa 2077). We blend cyberpunk corporate espionage, tactical military realism, and creeping anomalous/eldritch horror into a single, cohesive universe.

In this world, you are an operative working for SSS, the private military and intelligence arm of the monolithic mega-corporation known simply as Monolith. You aren't heroes saving the world; you are corporate assets doing the dirty, bloody, and often mind-bending work required to keep the company's bottom line secure and the unknown terrors of the world contained.

If you are looking for a roleplay environment that features intense character development, strict in-character consequences, moral ambiguity, and terrifying encounters with the unknown, SSS is the place for you.

Our roleplay is strictly intended for mature writers who enjoy dark, complex storytelling. SSS operations take place across a fractured geopolitical landscape from guarding corporate assets to navigating the fragile alliances.

But bullets and politics are only half the threat.

The world of SSS is plagued by the anomalous. Our operatives regularly deploy into unmapped liminal spaces, face down flesh-warping eldritch entities, and battle deranged cults wielding thaumaturgical magic. Your character will face physical trauma, psychological horror, and the agonizing weight of impossible choices.

Players in SSS can build their characters within distinct operational branches, each offering a vastly different roleplay experience.

Plot armor does not exist in Specter Security Services. We pride ourselves on a living, breathing disciplinary and medical system where your character's choices matter.

Are you ready to sign your contract?
Monolith is always hiring. Just remember to read the fine print regarding clone rights, corporate debt, and anomalous exposure.

OKEANOS DESCENT — A Ride Through Worlds Beyond Imagination

Imagine boarding a grand airship alongside 20 fellow explorers, lifting off above shimmering mystical seas, and soaring over lands painted in colors that seem to exist only in dreams. That is Okeanos Descent — a guided, story-driven attraction event in VRChat, crafted by a passionate Japanese creative team.

Drawing on the spirit of classic theme park boat rides and live-guided adventure attractions, we’ve built something new: a living, breathing world where every passenger is a protagonist. At select moments, the airship descends and you step off to explore — discovering hidden secrets on foot before returning to sail onward to the next wonder.

Every voyage is hosted live by our crew, guided by original narration, ambient soundscapes, and carefully choreographed scene reveals. No two journeys feel exactly alike — the magic is in sharing it with the people beside you.

What Makes the Voyage Unforgettable:

    • Mystical Seas & Vivid Lands — hand-crafted worlds, each a surreal wonder
    • Live Hosted Adventure — real crew, real narration, theme-park-show quality
    • On-Shore Exploration — step off and explore on foot at key moments
    • Intimate Group Experience — only 20 guests per voyage
    • 60 Minutes of Wonder — full immersive storytelling, perfectly paced
    • Crafted with Heart — born from a love of classic theme parks and Japanese creative tradition

We’re opening Okeanos Descent to international guests for the first time. If you love theme park magic, immersive storytelling, and the spirit of adventure — your cabin is waiting.

community.name: Vtuber Research Club
community.description:
Are you a VTuber agency?
No. We are a service for VTubers. You do not need to “join up” to make use of our services.

What does the VTRC do?
We provide telepresence services, which allow VTubers to attend in-person events virtually with their avatar through the use of robots and other screens.

What kind of events do you go to?
We mostly go to VTuber, anime, pop culture, and gaming conventions. We also go to smaller community and pop-up events in venues like boba shops, community centers, and breweries.

How do the robots work?
The Beam Pro robots we use are equipped with an LCD screen, a camera, and a microphone which allow for two-way communication between a VTuber and in-person attendees. The VTuber also has full control of the robot’s movement via an app on their PC using either the WASD keys, a mouse, or even a gamepad. The robot also has a downward-facing camera which assists in navigation and helps you prevent collisions and avoid obstacles.

How does the Backpack rig work?
Our backpack rig is a large screen that one of our staff members will physically wear and carry around. A VTuber simply has to join a Discord voice channel in this server and use OBS Virtual Camera to display their avatar. While the backpack rig does not give you the freedom of remotely-controlled movement, it gives you an option in cases where the robots are not an ideal choice, e.g., the venue doesn’t allow wheeled devices, your PC setup is incompatible with the Beam software, or you have anxieties about driving the robot.

community.name: Purrfectly Imperfect
community.description:
Welcome to Purrfectly Imperfect, your new place to call home!

Hey there, new friend! We're so glad you found your way here! Take a second to breathe and get comfy, you're home now~

- About Us -
Purrfectly Imperfect is a chill 18+ SFW community built on kindness, creativity, and of course, cats. 

Let's be real: making friends is weirdly hard. Between life, work, and the chaos of public VRChat instances, making that first connection feels almost impossible nowadays, especially when social anxiety is weighing you down. That's why we created this group: to make connecting a lot less scary and a lot more fun!

 - What We Do -
We're here to create a warm, friendly, welcoming and fun space where we all can be ourselves, impurrfections and all. 

We host all kinds of fun and unique events, often with little extras sprinkled in that make them stand out. Thanks to our talented Media, Creative, and Technical teams, we are able to build custom worlds, assets, Discord bot integrations, websites and much more to make our events feel special! 

Outside of our regular events, we also organize special events to guide those navigating social anxiety. Because VRChat is better together, and everyone deserves a place to call home!

Ready to make some friends? We'd love to have you! <3

community.name: Wardens of Leefside
community.description:
Wardens of Leefside is a fantasy roleplay set in a standalone world with an 18-century flair. Players participate as residents of the town of Leefside, a small seaside town, with the occasional adventure within other locales. Wardens is a community-focused roleplay with a dedicated team of full-time GMs to organize and help players with their experiences.

The roleplay is focused on the lives of the characters living and visiting the town. We also weave stories from the wider world into the story of the town, and its many diverse characters. Most sessions take place in Leefside, and we also run occasional out-of-town excursions. 

Our goal is to tell a shared story with the characters of the town, together as GMs and Players. We strive towards creating an easy-going atmosphere out of character where cast members can drop-in or drop-out at their leisure during session, there is no strict attendance or timetable pressures on players. We are systems-lite and instead focus on the interpersonal roleplay between characters, not on dice rolls or mechanics. 

There is no difference between player characters, support cast or NPCs - everyone in the roleplay is a cast member, and can freely choose how they want to participate. There is no requirement to be a NPC first, and no slotting for character slots. 

Leefside runs on Mondays 7pm EST for 5 hours.

OVERVIEW˸
Welcome and Thank you for joining the UNIVERSE OF HALOǃ We are a Halo PVP MilSim Group that thrives on its community and developers․ This is a community where no harassment will be tolerated and it will be dealt with immediately Please read the rules and join the Discord‚ it's where you will get your roles and pings for when we do eventsǃ It's also where everyone is so you can chat ask questions and moreǃ You'll have to click the checkmark in Rules and PVP Rules to access all our channels‚ be sure to type something in general chat to receive your rolesǃ
WHAT WE OFFER˸
We have several maps that we use for combat as well as a few marine battalions to choose from when you join the server and other battalions you can work towards joining that require a higher skill level such as the ODST's and Spartans! You can also Rank up to unlock new weapons as well as custom avatars for you to use in the serverǃ
WHAT WE DO˸
We host PVP Combat events Monday-Friday from 7˸30PM EST To 9PM EST with our pre lobbies lasting the first 30 minutes to give people a chance to socialize and join․ After that we go to one of our several in house made worlds‚ set up teams‚ and play various game modes and battle scenarios throughout the event such as ; Team Elimination‚ VIP‚ Hostage‚ ＆ Much Moreǃ
THINGS TO KNOW˸ 
You do NOT need to join every single day‚ life always comes firstǃ If you can't attend let your battalion captain⁄commander knowǃ If you are not in a battalion don't worry about telling anyone․ Rank-Ups are given based off of attendance and improvement so be sure to get out there and show your skillsǃ Any sort of disrespect to members will result in punishment․ The UOH Does NOT get involved in other servers drama including those we are allied with‚ keep drama out of the server․

All that being said we hope you have a wonderful time hereǃ Happy Shootingǃ

community.name: Clone Troopers of VRChat
community.description:
"The Clone Troopers of VRChat is a group of Star Wars fans that use VRChat as a platform for Clone Wars oriented combat and role play events. We are a PC/VR only community that uses maps created by the community development team and avatars made by the avatar creation team to immerse ourselves in the world of Star Wars!

We have two roles available depending on how you would like to be involved in the community. Cadet is for those who wish to participate in combat events by joining a battalion. Visitor is for those who want to hang around in the discord or are unable to participate in combat events due to system restrictions. While being a visitor, you may also become an Astromech for certain battalions. Astromechs are allowed to join events and sometimes participate depending on the game mode.

We host a wide range of events, majority of which are spontaneous, but there are always a few scheduled. Our Main event is hosted every Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday at 7 pm Eastern Standard Time. We also have cadet tryouts, battalion tryouts and many more combat oriented events throughout the day. The event host will announce the events through the discord server for anyone to join!"

community.name: Echo's Nanachi Avatars
community.description:
This community is built around my avatars/avatar related projects, short films and the Avatar Jam events that I run once every 2 months! You'll find extremely welcoming and friendly people in this community, along with dedicated avatar creators always willing to help out or learn a new thing or two. This year, we plan to include a newly formed group into our meetups and activities, the Alien Invasion group!

Avatar Jams are events that welcome all creators of every skill level to try out their hand at making an avatar based on a selected theme over the course of 3 and a half days. A wide variety of avatar creators participate each jam, ranging from people who just picked up unity to veterans that have been in the scene for years! People love seeing what you come up with no matter how strong your avatar creation skills are!

After the 3.5 days are up, a public showcase is held where participants get to show off their hard work to an audience, or afterwards during the hangout when the public showcase is done!

community.name: Russian Empire
community.description:
The Russian Empire is a historical roleplay group that mainly focuses on combat with European countries within the early 19 to early 20th century. Originally founded in 2019, we strive to "attempt at recreating the past" and help people learn more about Russian history or European history and keeping it's integrity. Currently fictionally we are at war with the newly founded Polish congress who pose a threat to our nation's goals and sovereignty.

Although we have nothing related to the real life events of the Russian empire other than the uniform we wear, we are a fictional alternate universe. This means that certain events that happened maybe changed for Roleplay purposes, unless it is a non fictional event.

We're here at PJKT to look for new members to join as well as friends to make with other communities! 
Feel free to also check out our friends at Waifuwehr, 1st Weimar Republic, and British Armed Forces!
